name: @types/react
usage_summary: React (JSX/TSX) is used in 147+ source files across app, cli-kit, ui-extensions-dev-console, ui-extensions-server-kit, and ui-extensions-test-utils. react@19.2.4 (used in app and cli-kit) and react@18.x (used in ui-extensions packages) do not ship their own .d.ts files. All five packages declare @types/react in devDependencies.
how_to_remove: Not removable while React is used. React does not bundle its own types (confirmed: react@19.2.4 package.json has no types field and no .d.ts files). @types/react must be retained in all five packages.
replacement_reason: React is the core UI framework used monorepo-wide. Neither react@18 nor react@19 bundles type declarations, so @types/react is essential across all five packages.
